title: hymenophyllum brachyglossum
intro: Hymenophyllum brachyglossum, also known as the toothless polypody, is a species of fern in the family Hymenophyllaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Hymenophyllum brachyglossum include treating various ailments such as fever, cough, and digestive issues. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
